problem id: af5302ca
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11111000 -> 01111111
  00010100 -> 00001010
  01001000 -> 00101101
  11101001 -> 11111101
  00100010 -> 00010101
  00111011 -> 10011111
  11011010 -> 01111111
  01110110 -> 00111111
  10011101 -> 11011111

query: 00111010
predicted answer: 00011111
